title: hahnia aria var. graeca
intro: Hahnia aria var. graeca, also known as Greek Hahnia or Greek mountain tea, is a plant species within the Hahnia genus, native to the Balkan Peninsula and Mediterranean regions. Traditionally, this herb has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with consuming Hahnia aria var. graeca include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Hahnia aria var. graeca include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to topical creams and ointments for its medicinal benefits.
